markdown_projection.note: JSON contract is authority. No markdown projection is generated for WP-KERNEL-009 (prevents projection drift).

scope.scope: Verify editor text, controls, embeds, graph/backlink panes, and UserManual links do not overlap on desktop/narrow viewports. This MT belongs to SecurityPortabilityValidation. Prove WP-009 behavior with negative fixtures, visual debugging, portability checks, and validator-ready evidence.
constraints: Use the existing microtask_plan_draft execution surface only; do not introduce a separate MT execution surface or suite field.

Core Handshake behavior must be Handshake-native: no outside app, outside server, external daemon, Docker-only path, SQLite fallback, Redis/Valkey cache authority, or sidecar paper as proof or authority.

Allowed external runtime inputs are limited to operator-provided models, GGUF/model files, tensors/safetensors, and CUI portable artifacts where the owning WP explicitly gates them; Tiptap and Monaco are allowed only as bundled/lockfile-governed product libraries integrated into Handshake.

PostgreSQL plus EventLedger is canonical for durable state, receipts, indexing evidence, runtime proof, and validation; generated markdown, wiki pages, HTML, context bundles, debug reports, and UI projections are projections only.
Every implementation handoff must be restartable by a no-context local model using only the WP/MT contract, current Master Spec bundle, product code, tests, and receipts.
Validation must include negative fixtures for false PASS, stale state, missing Postgres, missing assets, secret leakage, partial PDF extraction, parallel write conflicts, and UI overlap.
Portability checks must reject hardcoded machine paths and authority stored only in generated projections.
scope.expected_behavior: EditorVisualRegressionFixture leaves a concrete, restartable implementation or activation artifact with PostgreSQL/EventLedger authority, Master Spec anchors, UserManual impact, and validator-readable evidence.
acceptance_criteria: EditorVisualRegressionFixture is implemented or specified with enough detail for a no-context local model to continue from the MT alone.
The MT names exact product/governance files, state tables or APIs, constraints, failure modes, and verification evidence.
The MT rejects sidecar research-paper authority and outside-runtime proof; accepted research ideas are restated as Handshake-native requirements.
The MT handoff names HBR rows proven, blocked, or not applicable with concrete reasons.
verification: Parse the WP/MT contract and confirm this MT keeps all required fields populated.
Run the smallest relevant product, governance, or fixture test available for the touched surface; if not implemented yet, define the exact future test and negative case.
For UI/editor/UserManual surfaces, use visual debugging or declare why no GUI surface exists for this MT.
Confirm no SQLite, Docker-default, external-app, external-daemon, sidecar-paper, or mock-only proof satisfies the MT.
handoff_requirements: List files changed or intentionally left untouched.
List commands/tests run and exact pass/fail/blocker status.
List EventLedger/PostgreSQL evidence, receipt IDs, fixtures, visual-debug artifacts, and repair queues produced or expected.
List remaining risks, compatibility shims, deprecated wording, and next MTs unblocked.

evidence.summary: MT-234 adds a production-built editor visual regression harness and Playwright visual fixture for the real RichTextEditor. The fixture covers editor text, toolbar/control overlays, resolved inline links, embed image/slideshow NodeViews, graph/backlink sidecar, UserManual link, narrow/desktop layout branching, loopback asset serving, same-origin HTTP failure detection, and screenshot quality gating.

RED first failed on the missing production-built harness artifact. GREEN proof passed after implementation and final hardening, including rebuilt dist-harness visual matrix, focused editor unit tests, dependency-policy regressions, lint, diff check, and ASCII check for new files.
commands: RED: pnpm exec playwright test --config playwright.config.ts --project visual-normal-1280-light-en-US --grep "MT-234" -> failed missing dist-harness/harness/editor-visual-regression.html
pnpm exec playwright test --config playwright.config.ts --grep "MT-234" -> 3 passed
pnpm run test -- src/lib/editor/visual_debug.test.ts src/lib/editor/editor_commands.test.ts -> 17 passed
pnpm run test:dependency-policy -- rich_editor_roundtrip.spec.ts editor_embeds_export_find.spec.ts -> 5 passed
git diff --check MT-234 touched files -> exit 0
Select-String ASCII check on new MT-234 files -> no matches

evidence.summary: Initial adversarial review found narrow sidecar clipping, weak screenshot assertion, incomplete named-surface overlap coverage, and same-origin 404 gaps; all were hardened. Second review found raw-prefix origin filtering, first-link-only geometry coverage, and stale Monaco fixture CSS; all were fixed. Final read-only adversarial review PASS found no blocking false-pass path for origin isolation, editor links, embeds, sidecar panels, UserManual link, stale Monaco scope, or same-origin network failures.
KB_READY_CHECKLIST_RECEIPT emitted PASS before READY_FOR_VALIDATION transition.

wp_validator_review_v2.review_method: Integration Validator multi-agent workflow (wf_0ac25815-485 + wf_98386044-70a): independent per-MT reviewer + adversarial confirm on FAIL. No ACP. Governance/repo paperwork non-blocking per operator directive (2026-06-18). Bar = good code vs MT contract + WP packet + current Master Spec v02.194, plus the WP_VALIDATOR Spec-Realism Gate.
wp_validator_review_v2.summary:
MT-234 requires a production-built editor visual-regression harness and a Playwright fixture proving the real rich editor text, controls, embeds, graph/backlink panes, and UserManual links render without incoherent overlap on desktop and narrow viewports. The committed code mounts the real RichTextEditor into a production harness build wired into vite.harness.config.ts, and a 617-line spec performs genuine geometry/overlap assertions, real command exercises, loopback-only network isolation, and a real PNG quality gate. The implementation is real, spec-aligned, and placeholder-free.</summary>
</invoke>
findings: harness mounts the REAL product RichTextEditor (app/src/components/RichTextEditor.tsx, 1492 lines) at editor_visual_regression_harness.tsx lines 11 and 389 with real hsLink nodes, real EmbedResolverContext, and real debug instrumentation - not a stub or mock.

editor_visual_regression.spec.ts lines 246-517 perform real overlap proofs: boundingBox geometry, assertNoOverlap across toolbar/surface, editorPanel/sidecar, embeds/backlinks/userManual, plus viewport branching width<=700 narrow-stack vs desktop side-by-side at lines 353-361, matching playwright visual-narrow 390 and visual-normal 1280 projects.

Network isolation is real: route aborts all non-loopback origins (lines 274-282), asserts externalRequests empty (line 494); same-origin 400+ responses captured and asserted empty (lines 283-288 and 495-498). Loopback server serves real built dist-harness assets (lines 62-113).

Screenshot proof gated by real assertRenderedPngQuality (image_quality.ts line 108) which decodes the PNG and throws on insufficient color buckets or saturated pixels (image_quality.ts line 140) - not a no-op.
Sub-rule 1: grep of all four MT-234 files found zero placeholders or deferred-live escapes.

Sub-rule 2: required surface is the real RichTextEditor UI plus loopback embed routes (UI/visual MT, not durable-PG authority); proof exercises the real component and real built artifacts. No mock-only substitution where real was required.
Sub-rule 3: claimed_by is KERNEL_BUILDER, completed_by is null (READY_FOR_VALIDATION) - no self-certification; proof is real regardless.
Boundary and hygiene clean: all four files under app/ and tests/; no /.GOV/ touched. dist-harness and test-results are gitignored and not committed.
Aside (non-blocking, expected): no commit message greps MT-234; files were persisted under checkpoint commit c49afb7f. Paperwork detail only, not a code defect.
evidence_checked: git log and ls-files commit c49afb7f

minimum_controls: No placeholders, mocks, scaffolding, or deferred-live escapes; runtime proof against Handshake-managed PostgreSQL/EventLedger where the contract names durable state.
